compiled_state.title: [af9e-77fc] GREEN: Implement migrate-runtime-refs.py with inject/replace/annotate operations
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What to do
Implement plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py — migrates runtime plugins/dso references in shell scripts to use _PLUGIN_ROOT.

## 3 operations

### inject
For each .sh file lacking `_PLUGIN_ROOT=`:
Add this declaration after the shebang line (or after `set -e`/`set -euo pipefail` if on line 2):
```
_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)/..}"
```

### replace
In non-comment code lines (lines NOT starting with #):
Replace `plugins/dso/<path>` with `${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/<path>`
Pattern: r'(?<!\$\{)plugins/dso/([^\s"'`)]*)' → r'${_PLUGIN_ROOT}/\1'

### annotate
Lines matching git-relative path patterns (git diff --name-only output, case patterns, grep on repo-relative paths):
Append ` # plugin-self-ref-ok: git-relative path pattern` if not already present.
Detection: line contains plugins/dso AND (git diff | git show | case.*\| | --name-only | _PATTERN= )

## CLI interface
python3 migrate-runtime-refs.py [--dry-run] [--verbose] <target_dir>

## Constraints
- Only modify non-comment lines for replace/annotate operations
- inject: preserve existing shebang; add _PLUGIN_ROOT as the first non-shebang, non-set-e line
- Must be idempotent
- Files with only git-relative patterns (no true runtime refs) still get annotated, not injected

## Files to create
- plugins/dso/scripts/migrate-runtime-refs.py

## testing_mode: GREEN
